basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Warangal has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Telangana. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) is 30 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per the norms and guidelines of the Institute.

qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.Tech/BE in Electrical Engineering or Electrical & Electronics Engineering or equivalent and M.Tech/M.E in Power Electronics, Power Electronics and Drives, Electric Vehicle, Electric Transportation, Smart Mobility, Sustainable Systems/Renewable Energy, Energy Storage Technologies, Smart Electric Grid, Renewable Energy, Electrical Engineering or closely aligned specialization with consistent first-class academic record. Preference for GATE in EE and prior R&D experience.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): ₹ 37,000/- per month for the first two years and ₹ 42,000/- per month for the third year.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Warangal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Overview
NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.Tech/BE in Electrical Engineering or Electrical & Electronics Engineering or equivalent and M.Tech/M.E in Power Electronics, Power Electronics and Drives, Electric Vehicle, Electric Transportation, Smart Mobility, Sustainable Systems/Renewable Energy, Energy Storage Technologies, Smart Electric Grid, Renewable Energy, Electrical Engineering or closely aligned specialization with consistent first-class academic record. Preference for GATE in EE and prior R&D experience.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) is 30 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per the norms and guidelines of the Institute.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): ₹ 37,000/- per month for the first two years and ₹ 42,000/- per month for the third year.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Warangal to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post in NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026. This provides a focused opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts at NIT Warangal is 19 July 2026. Candidates should ensure their applications are submitted by this deadline.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 is Online. Candidates need to submit their applications through the official online portal.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the norms and guidelines of the Institute.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) at NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: The salary for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) is ₹ 37,000/- per month for the first two years, increasing to ₹ 42,000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech/BE in Electrical Engineering or EEE and an M.Tech/M.E in Power Electronics or a closely aligned field, with a consistent first-class academic record. GATE qualification is preferred.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts at NIT Warangal primarily involves an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for NIT Warangal JRF?
faq.answer: The job location for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is Warangal, Telangana. This position is based at the National Institute of Technology Warangal campus.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official website of NIT Warangal before 19 July 2026. Ensure all details are filled correctly and required documents are uploaded.
